description_long: This helicopter features a compact, somewhat blocky fuselage with a cylindrical vertical structure on top, likely representing the main rotor mast. The body is primarily covered in a patterned texture resembling a decorative rug or tapestry, with a mix of red, brown, and white colors. The helicopter's underside and sides appear partially open or incomplete, revealing gaps and a lack of solid structure. The main rotor blades are not clearly visible, and there is no discernible tail boom or tail rotor present. The landing gear is ambiguous, with no clear skids or wheels visible, and the cockpit area lacks defined windows or framing. The overall appearance suggests a stylized or abstract representation rather than a realistic helicopter model.
description: A compact, abstract helicopter with a patterned, rug-like exterior and a cylindrical mast on top. Lacks visible rotor blades, tail, or cockpit windows.
description_view_0: The helicopter is seen from an angle showing the cylindrical mast on top and a large open gap on the left side, with the patterned surface most visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top and rear, showing the mast and the patterned, semi-circular base, with the open underside more apparent.
description_view_2: The right side is visible, showing the rectangular body, mast, and a large open section at the rear, with the patterned surface extending around the base.
description_view_3: The rear and right side are shown, with the patterned base and mast visible, and the open, incomplete structure of the body more pronounced.
attribute_landing_skids: not visible; landing gear type indeterminate due to incomplete structure
